action: Implement per-task research cache for Scout per approved plan at /Users/danleemh/.claude/plans/witty-cuddling-beacon.md. Goal: research findings persist across cycles, keyed by sha256 content fingerprint over normalized action+acceptance_criteria+target_files, so deferred carryoverTodos[] do NOT require re-research. THREE PHASES. PHASE A (schema + utilities): (1) create scripts/utility/task-fingerprint.sh (deterministic sha256 with bash-3.2 compat, no GNU-only sed/date); (2) create scripts/utility/research-cache.sh (CLI: 'check <task_id>' exits 0/10/20/30/40 = HIT/STALE/MISS/INVALIDATED/NO_ENTRY, 'invalidate <fp> [--reason X]', 'list [--task <id>]', 'gc'); (3) create scripts/lifecycle/promote-research-cache.sh as single-writer promotion (staging → .evolve/research/by-task/<fp>.md + sidecar .json, updates state.json:researchCache.entries[] via atomic mv-of-temp jq write, adds research_pointer/research_fingerprint/research_cycle fields to matching carryoverTodos[] entry, emits ledger kind=research_cache_write); (4) add researchCache top-level field schema to CLAUDE.md 'Shared Agent Values' block. PHASE B (agent integration): (1) agents/evolve-scout.md add Step 4.5 Cache Lookup (call research-cache.sh check per carryoverTodo, on HIT write 'Research Pointer: <path>' into task block and SKIP re-research, on STALE refresh same fingerprint, on MISS/NO_ENTRY standard flow) + Step 5.5 Stage per-task research (write to .evolve/runs/cycle-N/workers/research-cache-staging/<fp>.md — existing profile glob covers it, NO write-path profile change), require '## Research Cache' decisions section in scout-report.md, update STOP CRITERION; (2) agents/evolve-builder.md Step 2.5 upgrade (prefer task.research_pointer over topic-slug scan, log 'Research Source: per-task-cache' in build-report); (3) agents/evolve-triage.md add paragraph preserving research_pointer/fingerprint/cycle unchanged on include/defer; (4) scripts/lifecycle/reconcile-carryover-todos.sh (~line 283 area) archive cache entry + emit kind=research_cache_invalidate when todo dropped/archived, on auditor FAIL verdict for task carrying research_fingerprint set invalidated=true with reason 'audit-fail-cycle-N'; (5) scripts/utility/inject-task.sh add --research-pointer and --invalidate-cache flags (thread into JSON entry); (6) .evolve/profiles/scout.json add 'Bash(scripts/utility/research-cache.sh:*)' and 'Bash(scripts/utility/task-fingerprint.sh:*)' to allowed_tools (no write-path additions needed); (7) .evolve/profiles/builder.json optional add 'Bash(scripts/utility/research-cache.sh:*)' for re-validation. PHASE C (tests + rollout): (1) create scripts/tests/research-cache-test.sh (unit: fingerprint determinism — whitespace-only diff = same hash; HIT/STALE/MISS/INVALIDATED/NO_ENTRY state transitions; promotion idempotency); (2) create scripts/tests/research-cache-2cycle-test.sh (integration: cycle 1 inject task, run, MISS+stage; force defer; cycle 2 HIT, scout-report shows 'task-id: HIT (cycle 1, age 1)', ledger has 1 research_cache_write + 1 research_cache_hit); (3) create docs/architecture/research-cache.md design doc (~200 lines: schema, lifecycle, invalidation rules, env-var reference); (4) update docs/architecture/inbox-injection-protocol.md to document research_pointer passthrough. Feature behind EVOLVE_RESEARCH_CACHE_ENABLED=1 (default OFF); promotion script and Scout cache check no-op when unset. NO backfill of historical scout-reports. NO modification of trust kernel (phase-gate-precondition.sh, role-gate.sh, ship-gate.sh). Bash 3.2 compat throughout (no declare -A, no mapfile, no GNU sed/date). Atomic writes via mv-of-temp.
operator_note: Approved plan from ultrathink-investigation session 2026-05-14. User goal: 'keep the research and analyzed result report in the system and linked to the todo job, so in the next cycle, Scout doesn't need to re-do all the research again.' Verified gap: Scout-generated tasks have no research pointers; .evolve/research/<topic>.md is topic-keyed not task-keyed; state.json:researchCache field does not exist; carryoverTodos[*].evidence_pointer is single-string sparse. Open operator decisions: TTL default (recommend 5 cycles), audit-FAIL auto-invalidate (recommend yes). Trust kernel must remain untouched (no edits to phase-gate-precondition.sh, role-gate.sh, ship-gate.sh). Rollout per v8.55.0 ladder: behind EVOLVE_RESEARCH_CACHE_ENABLED=1 in v9.X.0, default-on in v9.X+2.
